description: Run shell commands in OpenShell-managed Docker sandboxes (NVIDIA OpenShell). Alternative to microsandbox: avoids macOS Hypervisor.framework (no idle-CPU burn on Apple Silicon Tahoe), includes network/inference policy support. MVP provides sandbox.shell only; browser sidecar and per-task pool are tracked for follow-ups.

setup.summary: Needs a running Docker daemon plus the openshell + openshell-gateway binaries on PATH. macOS Apple Silicon, Linux x86_64/aarch64, and rpm/deb distros all have prebuilt artefacts from upstream.

requirements.label: Docker daemon
requirements.description: Docker Desktop, Colima, Lima, OrbStack, or Rancher Desktop. Podman+libkrun on macOS is NOT supported (upstream bug NVIDIA/openshell#1519).

install.label: Docker Desktop (macOS / Windows)
install.description: Recommended on macOS — the openshell driver auto-detects its host-gateway alias.

steps.cmd: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y docker.io

requirements.label: openshell CLI
requirements.description: The `openshell` binary, used for sandbox create / exec / upload / download.

steps.cmd: mkdir -p ~/bin && cd /tmp && curl -fsSL -o openshell.tar.gz 'https://github.com/NVIDIA/openshell/releases/latest/download/openshell-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz' && tar xzf openshell.tar.gz && mv openshell ~/bin/ && xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine ~/bin/openshell && chmod +x ~/bin/openshell
echo 'Add ~/bin to PATH if not already there: export PATH="$HOME/bin:$PATH" in ~/.zshrc'

cd /tmp && curl -fsSL -o openshell.tar.gz 'https://github.com/NVIDIA/openshell/releases/latest/download/openshell-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz' && tar xzf openshell.tar.gz && sudo install -m 755 openshell /usr/local/bin/

install.label: Build from source (cargo)
install.description: Needs Rust 1.84+. Takes ~10 minutes first time.

requirements.label: openshell-gateway binary
requirements.description: The gateway daemon the plugin spawns per tenant. Major.minor version must match `openshell` CLI.

steps.cmd: mkdir -p ~/bin && cd /tmp && curl -fsSL -o gw.tar.gz 'https://github.com/NVIDIA/openshell/releases/latest/download/openshell-gateway-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz' && tar xzf gw.tar.gz && mv openshell-gateway ~/bin/ && xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine ~/bin/openshell-gateway && chmod +x ~/bin/openshell-gateway

cd /tmp && curl -fsSL -o gw.tar.gz 'https://github.com/NVIDIA/openshell/releases/latest/download/openshell-gateway-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz' && tar xzf gw.tar.gz && sudo install -m 755 openshell-gateway /usr/local/bin/

requirements.label: OpenShell community base image
requirements.description: Pre-pulled so the first sandbox doesn't stall on a ~700MB download.
